description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in a light cream color, complemented by brown and beige accents around the windows and porch columns. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by decorative columns, and the entrance is flanked by symmetrical windows. The property is enclosed by a low boundary wall, with a green lawn area in front and to one side. A cylindrical water tank is visible at the rear corner, and the windows and doors are framed in wood or a wood-like material. The overall design is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor space and a welcoming entryway.
description: A single-story cream-colored bungalow with a hip roof, covered porch, and enclosed lawn, featuring symmetrical windows and decorative columns.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the hip roof, a small window, and the boundary wall enclosing the back and side yard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and green lawn.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the hip roof, side windows, boundary wall, and a cylindrical water tank at the rear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows, boundary wall, and a partial view of the porch area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
